name: elnora-starter-plugins
description: Plugins bundled with the Elnora AI agent hackathon starter kit. Cloning the repo ships these locally — no external marketplace needed.

plugins.name: vercel
plugins.description: Vercel platform management plus v0 — deploy, configure, monitor, and debug projects, and build UIs/apps with the v0 Platform API. Use when: deploy, vercel, v0, preview, production, logs, domains, environment variables, cron jobs.
